title: Multi-tenant & multi-region serving + DSA 2-D DP
focus: Per-tenant LoRA vs base+adapter; data residency; noisy neighbors.

items.label: Multi-tenant model serving (per-tenant fine-tuning, isolation)
interviewQuestions: Compare per-tenant fine-tuned models vs a shared base model with adapters (LoRA).
How would you isolate a noisy or abusive tenant from degrading other tenants' latency?

items.label: Multi-region serving & data residency
interviewQuestions: How do data-residency requirements (e.g., EU data stays in EU) shape your serving topology?
What's the failover playbook when a region serving model traffic goes down?

items.label: Noisy neighbor & QoS
interviewQuestions: How would you protect a critical model from noisy-neighbor latency on shared infra?
Compare priority classes, resource quotas, and dedicated node pools for QoS — when does each fit?
Compare per-tenant fine-tuned models vs a shared base model with LoRA adapters — when does each win?
How do data-residency requirements (e.g., EU data stays in EU) shape your serving topology?
How would you protect a critical model from noisy-neighbor latency on shared infra?
